name: frontier-eval emits the up-to-30-day pre-release window and honors a window override
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/frontier-eval.sh" --emit md --window-days 14 2>e.txt; grep -q 'window_days=14' e.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/frontier-eval.sh" --emit md 2>e2.txt; grep -q 'window_days=30' e2.txt && echo h16-window 1>&2
